talents.name: Improved Aspect of the Hawk
talents.description: While Aspect of the Hawk is active, all normal ranged attacks have a 10% chance of increasing ranged attack speed by 3% for 12 sec.

talents.name: Endurance Training
talents.description: Increases the Health of your pet by 2% and your total health by 1%.

talents.name: Focused Fire
talents.description: All damage caused by you is increased by 1% while your pet is active and the critical strike chance of your Kill Command ability is increased by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Aspect of the Monkey
talents.description: Increases the Dodge bonus of your Aspect of the Monkey by 2%.

talents.name: Thick Hide
talents.description: Increases the armor rating of your pets by 7% and your armor contribution from items by 4%.

talents.name: Improved Revive Pet
talents.description: Revive Pet's casting time is reduced by 3 sec, mana cost is reduced by 20%, and increases the health your pet returns with by an additional 15%.

talents.name: Pathfinding
talents.description: Increases the speed bonus of your Aspect of the Cheetah and Aspect of the Pack by 4%.

talents.name: Bestial Swiftness
talents.description: Increases the outdoor movement speed of your pets by 30%.

talents.name: Unleashed Fury
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your pets by 4%.

talents.name: Improved Mend Pet
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Mend Pet spell by 10% and gives the Mend Pet spell a 25% chance of cleansing 1 Curse, Disease, Magic or Poison effect from the pet each tick.

talents.name: Ferocity
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your pet by 2%.

talents.name: Spirit Bond
talents.description: While your pet is active, you and your pet will regenerate 1% of total health every 10 sec.

talents.name: Intimidation
talents.description: Command your pet to intimidate the target on the next successful melee attack, causing a high amount of threat and stunning the target for 3 sec.

talents.name: Bestial Discipline
talents.description: Increases the Focus regeneration of your pets by 50%.

talents.name: Animal Handler
talents.description: Increases your speed while mounted by 4% and your pet's chance to hit by 2%. The mounted movement speed increase does not stack with other effects.

talents.name: Frenzy
talents.description: Gives your pet a 20% chance to gain a 30% attack speed increase for 8 sec after dealing a critical strike.

talents.name: Ferocious Inspiration
talents.description: When your pet scores a critical hit, all party members have all damage increased by 1% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Bestial Wrath
talents.description: Send your pet into a rage causing 50% additional damage for 18 sec. While enraged, the beast does not feel pity or remorse or fear and it cannot be stopped unless killed.

talents.name: Catlike Reflexes
talents.description: Increases your chance to dodge by 1% and your pet's chance to dodge by an additional 3%.

talents.name: Serpent's Swiftness
talents.description: Increases ranged combat attack speed by 4% and your pet's melee attack speed by 4%.

talents.name: The Beast Within
talents.description: When your pet is under the effects of Bestial Wrath, you also go into a rage causing 10% additional damage and reducing mana costs of all spells by 20% for 18 sec. While enraged, you do not feel pity or remorse or fear and you cannot be stopped unless killed.

talents.name: Improved Concussive Shot
talents.description: Gives your Concussive Shot a 4% chance to stun the target for 3 sec. (Proc chance: 4%)

talents.name: Lethal Shots
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance with ranged weapons by 1%.

talents.name: Improved Hunter's Mark
talents.description: Causes 20% of your Hunter's Mark ability's base attack power to apply to melee attack power as well.

talents.name: Efficiency
talents.description: Reduces the Mana cost of your Shots and Stings by 2%.

talents.name: Go for the Throat
talents.description: Your ranged critical hits cause your pet to generate 25 Focus.

talents.name: Improved Arcane Shot
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Arcane Shot by 0.2 sec.

talents.name: Aimed Shot
talents.description: An aimed shot that increases ranged damage by 70 and reduces healing done to that target by 50%. Lasts 10 sec.

talents.name: Rapid Killing
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Rapid Fire ability by 1 min. In addition, after killing an opponent that yields experience or honor, your next Aimed Shot, Arcane Shot or Auto Shot causes 10% additional damage. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: Improved Stings
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Serpent Sting and Wyvern Sting by 6% and the mana drained by your Viper Sting by 6%. In addition, reduces the chance your Stings will be dispelled by 6%.

talents.name: Mortal Shots
talents.description: Increases your ranged weapon critical strike damage bonus by 6%.

talents.name: Concussive Barrage
talents.description: Your successful Auto Shot attacks have a 2% chance to Daze the target for 4 sec. (Proc chance: 2%)

talents.name: Scatter Shot
talents.description: A short-range shot that deals 50% weapon damage and disorients the target for 4 sec. Any damage caused will remove the effect. Turns off your attack when used.

talents.name: Barrage
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Multi-Shot and Volley spells by 4%.

talents.name: Combat Experience
talents.description: Increases your total Agility by 1% and your total Intellect by 3%.

talents.name: Ranged Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage you deal with ranged weapons by 1%.

talents.name: Careful Aim
talents.description: Increases your ranged attack power by an amount equal to 15% of your total Intellect.

talents.name: Trueshot Aura
talents.description: Increases the attack power of party members within 45 yards by 50. Lasts until cancelled.

talents.name: Improved Barrage
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Multi-Shot ability by 4% and gives you a 33% chance to avoid interruption caused by damage while channeling Volley.

talents.name: Master Marksman
talents.description: Increases your ranged attack power by 2%.

talents.name: Silencing Shot
talents.description: A shot that deals 50% weapon damage and Silences the target for 3 sec.

talents.name: Monster Slaying
talents.description: Increases all damage caused against Beasts, Giants and Dragonkin targets by 1% and increases critical damage caused against Beasts, Giants and Dragonkin targets by an additional 1%.

talents.name: Humanoid Slaying
talents.description: Increases all damage caused against Humanoid targets by 1% and increases critical damage caused against Humanoid targets by an additional 1%.

talents.name: Hawk Eye
talents.description: Increases the range of your ranged weapons by 2 yards.

talents.name: Savage Strikes
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Raptor Strike and Mongoose Bite by 10%.

talents.name: Entrapment
talents.description: Gives your Immolation Trap, Frost Trap, Explosive Trap, and Snake Trap a 8% chance to entrap the target, preventing them from moving for 4 sec. (Proc chance: 8%)

talents.name: Deflection
talents.description: Increases your Parry chance by 1%.

talents.name: Improved Wing Clip
talents.description: Gives your Wing Clip ability a 7% chance to immobilize the target for 5 sec. (Proc chance: 7%)

talents.name: Clever Traps
talents.description: Increases the duration of Freezing and Frost Trap effects by 15%, the damage of Immolation and Explosive Trap effects by 15%, and the number of snakes summoned from Snake Traps by 15%.

talents.name: Survivalist
talents.description: Increases total health by 2%.

talents.name: Deterrence
talents.description: When activated, increases your Dodge and Parry chance by 25% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Trap Mastery
talents.description: Decreases the chance enemies will resist trap effects by 5%.

talents.name: Surefooted
talents.description: Increases hit chance by 1% and increases the chance movement impairing effects will be resisted by an additional 5%.

talents.name: Improved Feign Death
talents.description: Reduces the chance your Feign Death ability will be resisted by 2%.

talents.name: Survival Instincts
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 2% and increases attack power by 2%.

talents.name: Killer Instinct
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance with all attacks by 1%.

talents.name: Counterattack
talents.description: A strike that becomes active after parrying an opponent's attack. This attack deals 40 damage and immobilizes the target for 5 sec. Counterattack cannot be blocked, dodged, or parried.

talents.name: Resourcefulness
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of all traps and melee abilities by 20% and reduces the cooldown of all traps by 2 sec.

talents.name: Lightning Reflexes
talents.description: Increases your Agility by 3%.

talents.name: Thrill of the Hunt
talents.description: Gives you a 33% chance to regain 40% of the mana cost of any shot when it critically hits. (Proc chance: 33%)

talents.name: Wyvern Sting
talents.description: A stinging shot that puts the target to sleep for 12 sec. Any damage will cancel the effect. When the target wakes up, the Sting causes 300 Nature damage over 12 sec. Only one Sting per Hunter can be active on the target at a time.

talents.name: Expose Weakness
talents.description: Your ranged criticals have a 33% chance to apply an Expose Weakness effect to the target. Expose Weakness increases the attack power of all attackers against that target by 25% of your Agility for 7 sec. (Proc chance: 33%)

talents.name: Master Tactician
talents.description: Your successful ranged attacks have a 6% chance to increase your critical strike chance with all attacks by 2% for 8 sec. (Proc chance: 6%)

talents.name: Readiness
talents.description: When activated, this ability immediately finishes the cooldown on your other Hunter abilities.
